sections.sectionTitle: Judah leh Simeon in Adonibezek Man

verses.text: Joshua a sih khit ciangin Israel mite in Topa tungah thu dong uh a, “Kanaan mite a sim dingin kua kuanto masa ding ka hi uh hiam?” a ci uh hi
Topa in, “Judah minamte kuanto masa ding uh hi. En un, amau' khutsungah tua leitang ka piazo hi,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin Judah minamte in a sanggam uh Simeon minamte kiangah, “Kanaan mite i zawh theihna dingin ko tungah hong kipia gamah kote hong zui un. Tua mah bangin no hong kipia gamah kote in zong kong zui ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin Simeon minamte in a zui uh hi
Tua ciangin Judah minamte kuanto uh a, Topa in amaute' khutsungah Kanaan mite leh Perez mite a pia hi. Amaute in Bezek-ah tua mite tul sawm bang a zo uh hi
Amaute in Bezek-ah Adonibezek tuakin amah tawh kido uh a, Kanaan mite leh Perez mite a zo uh hi
Adonibezek tai hi. Ahih hangin amaute in delhin man uh a, a khutpite leh a khepite attan uh hi

Tua ciangin Adonibezek in, “A khutpi leh a khepi a ki-attan kumpi sawmsagihte in ka sabuai nuai-ah an nengkia tawm ngei uh hi. Ka gamtatnasa bangin Pasian in kei hong thuk hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amaute in Jerusalem-ah amah paipih uh a, tua munah amah a si hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Judah Minamte in Jerusalem leh Hebron Zo

verses.text: Tua ciangin Judah mite in Jerusalem simin la uh a, a mite thatin a khuapi hal uh hi
Tua khit ciangin Judah mite, mualtung gam, Negeb gam, leh lei niamna-a teng Kanaan mite a sim dingin paisuk uh hi
Tua ciangin Hebron (Hebron pen a nidangin Kiriatharba)-ah a teng Kanaan mite a sim dingin Judah mite kuansuk uh a, amaute in Sheshai leh Ahiman leh Talmai a zo uh hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Othniel in Debir zo-in Aksah Ngah

verses.text: Tua lai panin Debir mite a sim dingin amaute a pai uh hi. Debir min pen nidangin Kiriathsefer ahi hi
Tua ciangin Kaleb in, “Kiriathsefer simin a lazopa tungah a zi dingin ka tanu Aksah ka pia ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Kaleb' naupa Kenaz' tapa Othniel in la a, amah in a zi dingin a tanu Aksah a pia pah hi
Tuanu tawh a kiten' ciangin a pa kiang panin lo khat a ngetna ding a zi hahsawl hi. A zi zong a la tung panin kum a, Kaleb in ama kiangah, “Bang ut na hi hiam?” a ci hi

Amah in, “Letsong khat hong pia in. Negeb lei keu gamah hong koih na hih ciangin tuikhukte zong hong pia in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Kaleb in ama tungah tuikhuk tungnungte leh tuikhuk nuainungte a pia hi.
Tua ciangin Moses' sungpate nam ahi Ken' suanlekhakte, Judah mite tawh nisuh khuapi panin Negeb gam Arad gei-a om Judah gamah paito uh a, tua lai munah tungin tua mite tawh a tengkhawm uh hi
Judah mite zong Simeon mite tawh paikhawmin Zefath-ah a teng Kanaan mite va zo-in susiamang uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin tua khuapi min Hormah kici hi
Judah mite in zong Gaza leh a gam, Ashkelon leh a gam, leh Ekron leh a gamte a la uh hi
Topa in Judah mite huh ahih manin amaute in mualtung gamteng luah uh a, ahih hangin zang gama teng mite hawlkhia zolo uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in sik leeng nei uh hi
Tua ciangin Moses in a gensa bangin Kaleb tungah Hebron kipia a, tua sung panin amah in Anak' tapa thumte a hawlkhia hi
Ahih hangin Benjamin mite in Jerusalem-ah a teng Jebus mite hawlkhia lo uh ahih manin tuni dongin Jebus mite pen Jerusalem-ah Benjamin mite tawh a tengkhawm uh hi.
Josef minamte zong Bethel a sim dingin kuanto uh a, Topa in amaute a huh hi
Amaute in thu kansim dingin Bethel-ah mi sawl uh hi. (Tua khuapi min pen a nidangin Luz ahi hi
Thu kansimte in khuapi panin hong paikhia mi khat mu-in ama kiangah, “Khuapi sung lutna lampi hong hilh in, kong thum uh hi, nang tungah kong diktat ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi
Tua ciangin amah in khuapi sung lutna lampi amaute a lak hi. Amaute in namsau tawh tua khuapi mite vat uh a, ahih hangin tua mipa leh a innkuante suaktasak uh hi
A nung ciangin Hit mite gamah tua mipa pai-in khuapi khat sat a, a min pen Luz ci-in a phuak hi. Tudongin tua khua min pen Luz mah ahi hi.

Manasseh mite in Bethshean leh a khuaneute-a teng mite, Taanak leh a khuaneute-a teng mite, Dor leh a khuaneute-a teng mite, Ibleam leh a khuaneute-a teng mite ahi a, Megiddo leh a khuaneute-a teng mite ahi zongin hawlkhialo uh ahih manin Kanaan gammite tua leitangah tenglai uh hi
Ahi zongin Israel-te a thahat uh ciangin amaute in aana tawh na a sem dingin Kanaan mite koih uh a, hawlkhia sianglo uh hi
Efraim mite in zong Gezer-ah a teng Kanaan mite hawlkhia lo uh ahih manin Gezer-ah amaute' lakah Kanaan mite a teng uh hi.
Zebulun minamte in Kitron-a teng mite ahi a, Nahalol-a teng mite ahi zongin hawlkhia lo a, Kanaan mite amaute lakah tengin aana tawh nasemte a suak uh hi
Asher minamte in Akko-a teng mite, Sidon-a teng mite, Ahlab-a tengte, Akzib-a tengte, Helbah-a tengte, leh Afik-a tengte ahi a, Rehob-a tengte ahi zongin hawlkhia lo uh hi
Tua gama teng Kanaan mite lakah Asher mite teng uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in hawlkhia lo uh hi

Naftali minamte in Bethshemesh-a tengte ahi a, Bethanath-a tengte ahi zongin hawlkhia loin, tua gama teng Kanaan mite lakah a teng uh hi. Ahi zongin Bethshemesh leh Bethanath-a teng mite pen amaute-a' dingin aana tawh na a sem mite a suak uh hi
Amor mite in mualtung gamah Dan mite notkik uh a, zang gamah paisuk saklo uh hi
Amor mite pen Harheres, Aijalon, leh Shaalbim-ah teng uh a, ahih hangin Josef minamte in amaute gawt semsem a, amaute pen aana tawh nasemte a suak uh hi
Amor mite' gamgi pen Akrabbim kahtohna, Sela leilu lam pan kipan hi.
